designs.F0: market-value baseline: fee_pred = market_value_eur, no fitting
designs.F1_minimal: Ridge(log1p(fee) ~ log1p(market_value) + age + age^2 + pos_group + from_league + to_league), expanding-window walk-forward

gate.rule: F1 ships as a challenger only if (F0_rmse - F1_rmse)/F0_rmse >= threshold AND a paired bootstrap 90% CI on the RMSE difference excludes 0. Frozen before any model was fit — see git history of this file.
gate.simplicity_rule: if the gate is not cleared, F0 remains the provisional design (task 11.4)

metric: RMSE of log1p(fee) on pooled dev-evaluation rows (tune + calibration)
